lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har niramal haumai mail gavaae dar sachai sobhaa paavaniaa |2|
lines.english: The Pure Lord removes the filth of egotism, and we are honored in the True Court. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin har kaa naam man vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Through it, the Name of the Lord comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevee sabad suhaaeaa |
lines.english: I serve the True Guru; the Word of His Shabad is beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin gur seve sukh na hovee poorai bhaag gur paavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, peace is not obtained; through perfect destiny, the Guru is found. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur naam na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the Naam cannot be obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਰਹੇ ਬਿਲਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sidh saadhik rahe bilalaae |
lines.english: The Siddhas and the seekers lack it; they weep and wail.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਆਰਸੀ ਕੋਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man aarasee koee guramukh vekhai |
lines.english: This mind is a mirror; how rare are those who, as Gurmukh, see themselves in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਰਚਾ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਜਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਸੋਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: morachaa na laagai jaa haumai sokhai |
lines.english: Rust does not stick to those who burn their ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਿਹੁ ਨ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur kihu na dekhiaa jaae |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the Lord cannot be seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਹਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਜਾਏ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anahat baanee niramal sabad vajaae gurasabadee sach samaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: The Unstruck Melody of the Bani resounds through the Pure Word of the Shabad; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, we are absorbed into the True One. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape aap aap mil rahiaa sahaje sehaj samaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: All by Himself, He Himself is permeating and pervading; He is intuitively absorbed in celestial peace. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਆਪੁ ਦਿਤਾ ਦਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa kar aap ditaa dikhaae |
lines.english: Granting His Grace, He Himself has allowed me to see Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਇਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su ikas siau liv laae |
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh embraces love for the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਭਰਮੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: doojaa bharam gur sabad jalaae |
lines.english: Doubt and duality are burned away by the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh karanee har keerat saar |
lines.english: The life-style of the Gurmukh is sublime; he sings the Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa andar vanaj kare vaapaaraa naam nidhaan sach paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Within his body, he deals and trades, and obtains the Treasure of the True Name. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: anadin rang rataa gun gaavai andar mehal bulaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Night and day, he is imbued with the Lord's Love. He sings the Lord's Glorious Praises, and he is called to the Mansion of His Presence. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh paae mokh duaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh finds the gate of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਨਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag man sabad vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Through perfect destiny, the Shabad is enshrined in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa milai milaaeaa |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Giver, is met when the Lord leads us to meet Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੯॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee har sache ke gun gaavaniaa |8|9|10|
lines.english: O Nanak, the greatness of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is obtained by chanting the Glorious Praises of the True Lord. ||8||9||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਵੰਞਾਏ ਤਾ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aap vanyaae taa sabh kichh paae |
lines.english: Those who lose their own selves obtain everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree har gun anadin gaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵਣੰਜਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਘਰਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ਕਰਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sach vananjeh sach sanghareh sach vaapaar karaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: They trade in Truth, they gather in Truth, and they deal only in Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਚੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee sachee liv laae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they enshrine Love for the True one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤੇਰਾ ਤੂੰ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦੇਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau teraa toon tthaakur meraa sabad vaddiaaee devaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am Yours, You are my Lord and Master. You bestow greatness through the Word of Your Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸਚੁ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sache seviai sach vaddiaaee gur kirapaa te sach paavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Serving the True One, true greatness is obtained. By Guru's Grace, the True One is obtained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਸਚਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jit sachaa mere man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: when the True One becomes pleasing to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਲਾ ਵਖਤ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: velaa vakhat sabh suhaaeaa |
lines.english: That time, that moment is totally beautiful,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਰਸੁ ਚੂਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: an ras chookai har ras man vasaae |
lines.english: Other essences are forgotten, when the Lord's Essence comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhaau bhojan satigur tutthai paae |
lines.english: The food of spiritual love is obtained when the True Guru is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਨ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਮੂਰਖ ਅੰਧ ਗਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur na seveh moorakh andh gavaaraa |
lines.english: The blind and ignorant fools do not serve the True Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sach santokh sehaj sukh baanee poore gur te paavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Truth, contentment and intuitive peace and poise are obtained from the Bani, the Word of the Perfect Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: mar mar jameh fir fir aaveh jam dar chottaa khaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: They die and die, over and over again, only to be reborn, over and over again. They are struck down at Death's Door. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਓਇ ਕਿਥਹੁ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: fir oe kithahu paaein mokh duaaraa |
lines.english: how will they find the gate of salvation?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sache sev sadaa sukh paaein nau nidh naam man vasaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Serving the True One, they find a lasting peace; they enshrine the nine treasures of the Naam within their minds. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਸਾਦੁ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਤਾ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai saad jaaneh taa aap pachhaaneh |
lines.english: Those who know the essence of the Shabad, understand their own selves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: niramal baanee sabad vakhaaneh |
lines.english: Immaculate is the speech of those who chant the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: so thaan suhaaeaa jo har man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Beautiful is that place, which is pleasing to the Lord's Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਬਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat beh har gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: There, sitting in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, the Glorious Praises of the Lord are sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਹਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਦੁ ਵਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: anadin har saalaaheh saachaa niramal naad vajaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Night and day, the True One is praised; the Immaculate Sound-current of the Naad resounds there. ||6||
